business.name: BinTech Washing Repair
business.niche: Washing machine and dryer repair service in Dubai — all brands (Samsung, Bosch, LG, Siemens, Miele, Whirlpool, AEG, Beko). Same-day and emergency repair.

notes: The keyword set is overwhelmingly symptom-driven (spin, drain, door, leak, noise, power) rather than brand- or city-driven, so the pillar page should target the broad 'washing machine repair Dubai' intent while six mutually exclusive symptom clusters absorb the long tail. The Loud Noise cluster and Not Spinning cluster carry the largest combined volume and highest difficulty, making them priority pages for authority-building, while brand pages (Samsung, LG, Bosch) should be added as secondary pages since brand-specific queries repeat heavily across every symptom cluster.

questions.q: why is my washing machine so loud when it spins
questions.answer_angle: Lead with worn drum bearings as the top cause of grinding/banging noise during spin.

questions.q: why does my washing machine make a grinding noise when spinning
questions.answer_angle: Name bearing failure specifically and explain it needs professional bearing/drum replacement.

questions.q: is a banging noise from my washer dangerous
questions.answer_angle: Explain it usually signals an unbalanced drum or broken shock absorber, not immediate danger but needs repair.

questions.q: how much does it cost to fix a noisy washing machine in Dubai, United Arab Emirates
questions.answer_angle: Give AED range for bearing/shock absorber repair with same-day service note.

questions.q: why is my lg washing machine making a loud noise when spinning
questions.answer_angle: Point to LG-specific bearing or suspension rod wear and typical fix.

questions.q: can a noisy washing machine explode or catch fire
questions.answer_angle: Reassure it's rare but excessive vibration can damage wiring, recommend prompt inspection.

questions.q: why is my washing machine not spinning
questions.answer_angle: Lead with the top 3 causes (lid switch, drive belt, unbalanced load) in order of likelihood before diagnostics.

questions.q: how much does it cost to fix a washing machine that won't spin in Dubai, United Arab Emirates
questions.answer_angle: State a clear AED price range for spin motor/belt repair and mention same-day service.

questions.q: why does my samsung washer stop spinning halfway through the cycle
questions.answer_angle: Explain unbalanced load sensor triggers and how a technician resets/repairs it, citing Samsung error codes.

questions.q: how do I fix my washing machine that won't spin
questions.answer_angle: Give a short numbered DIY-check list, then recommend professional repair for motor/belt issues.

questions.q: is it worth repairing a washing machine that won't spin
questions.answer_angle: Compare average repair cost vs replacement cost to help decision, name typical AED figures.

questions.q: can a washing machine be fixed same day if it stops spinning
questions.answer_angle: Confirm same-day emergency repair availability across Dubai with typical response time.

questions.q: why is my washing machine leaking water from the bottom
questions.answer_angle: Lead with pump seal/hose connection as the most common cause and offer a visual check tip.

questions.q: why does my samsung washer leak from the door
questions.answer_angle: Explain worn door gasket/seal as the top cause with a replacement cost note.

questions.q: how much does it cost to fix a leaking washing machine in Dubai, United Arab Emirates
questions.answer_angle: Give an AED range depending on leak source (hose vs seal vs pump) with same-day repair mention.

questions.q: is it safe to keep using a washing machine that is leaking
questions.answer_angle: Warn about electrical risk and recommend immediate shutoff plus emergency callout.

questions.q: why is my washing machine leaking water when filling
questions.answer_angle: Point to inlet valve or detergent drawer seal issues as the specific cause.

questions.q: how do I manually drain my washing machine

questions.q: how much does it cost to fix a washing machine drain pump in Dubai, United Arab Emirates
questions.answer_angle: Quote an AED price range for pump/filter repair with same-day availability.

questions.q: why is there water left in my washing machine after the cycle ends
